general: In the past Year of the Snake, many people born in the Year of the Monkey undoubtedly faced a year of ups and downs due to the double influence of the clash with and breaking of Tai Sui. With the arrival of the Year of the Horse, there is no conflict with Tai Sui, and overall fortune will gradually stabilize, making it a year of fresh starts. In the Year of the Horse, fortunate to be blessed by the auspicious stars "Wen Chang" and "Yi Ma," career prospects are expected to soar. "Wen Chang" is a very auspicious star for learning and exams; in the new year, personal thinking will become clearer, and analytical abilities will be quite strong. Whether enrolling in in-service training or other comprehensive skills courses, good results can be achieved, and a broader perspective is expected. "Yi Ma" symbolizes travel and activity; for students still in school who plan to study abroad, it is recommended to implement their plans; and for those already working, it is best to participate more in industry promotion assessments and actively seek business travel opportunities, as performance will be better when traveling. Business people should also actively expand into overseas markets, promoting their products or services worldwide. As for "Traveling Horse," it is also favorable for marriages in different places. In the Year of the Horse, you may meet a suitable partner while traveling, or the other person may come to your place of residence to develop their career. It is advisable to pay more attention to the people around you. However, the Year of the Horse is also accompanied by the influence of the ominous star "Lonely Star." As the saying goes, "Men fear Lonely Star, women avoid Widow Star." Men born in the Year of the Monkey may easily feel lonely in the Year of the Horse. Even if they have a partner, they may feel that there is a lack of communication or that their partner does not understand them. Single friends who meet someone they like in the Year of the Horse and start a relationship should be careful that their enthusiasm does not fade. They need to invest more time in caring for their partner and maintaining the relationship. As for "Funeral Gate" and "Earthly Funeral," they may affect the family. In the Year of the Horse, pay special attention to the health of the elders. If you find that they are unwell, you should accompany them to see a doctor as soon as possible. If you live with the elders, you can consider renovating the home. Otherwise, you can replace curtains, sofas, or bedding, which have personal fortune, repair broken appliances, and place some green plants to add vitality. In the locations of the Five Yellow (South) and Two Black (Northwest) illness stars of the year, placing copper objects or heavy items near the head can purify the magnetic field and help improve health. In general, career prospects in the Year of the Horse are relatively smooth, especially for salaried workers, whose development will be quite ideal. Although salaries may not increase significantly, they will fortunately be appreciated and have good promotion opportunities. Business owners will need to travel frequently; if they can proactively expand their business to different countries and regions, they can "make money through movement." Furthermore, since the support of auspicious stars is mainly focused on career, both regular and windfall income depend on personal effort. Only through analysis and research can profits be made; it is not advisable to rely on luck or believe unverified information.
